rationale: Focused audit of png_handle_tRNS (libpng 1.6.47). The harness builds a valid PNG prefix (signature + IHDR palette + PLTE with 1 palette entry), then pushes a tRNS chunk whose 4-byte length field and up to 4 bytes of payload are symbolic. Target: implicit uint32->uint16 truncation in png_handle_tRNS palette mode + OOB read on palette index.
